steps.clue: Spirit-blast the rooftop voltmeter to reveal Pack-a-Punch.
Use Brutus to open the hidden ritual room and take the red stone.
Place the stone, track the spectral bird, and recover the Kronorium.
Read its numbers and complete all five portal challenges.
Add the five red orbs to the laboratory map.
Return to the Warden, escape the cells, and collect Brutus's orb.
Place the final orb and enter the Dark Mechanism.
Defeat Brutus and complete Richtofen's sacrifice.
